meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Debugging Strategy for AI Students
content.seo_description: Master SaaS development as a student. Overcome debugging hurdles with this advanced checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors and start building architecture. By deploying a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you inherit enterprise-grade error handling and logging. Use Antigravity to scaffold your boilerplate and Claude Code for iterative, AI-driven root cause analysis, effectively turning your debugging sessions into rapid learning milestones.
content.intro:
The screen glows, but the console is a graveyard of red text. You’ve spent hours chasing a recursive loop that shouldn't exist, and the impostor syndrome is starting to settle in. Every great engineer has stared into this abyss, but the difference between a student and a senior developer is the toolkit they wield when the code refuses to cooperate.

Your breakthrough isn't in memorizing syntax; it's in leveraging high-leverage abstractions. By adopting a professional SaaS starter kit, you shift from manual debugging to systemic architecture. We are going to replace your frustration with an automated engineering workflow, turning your development environment into a high-velocity lab for real-world software.

steps.title: Initialize Architecture with Antigravity
steps.description: Scaffold a modular, type-safe SaaS boilerplate that forces structural discipline from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js 15 SaaS starter kit with Supabase integration, Zod schema validation, and pre-configured error boundaries.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Logging
steps.description: Inject structured logging to ensure that when errors occur, they provide actionable stack traces rather than vague messages.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add Pino logger middleware to all API routes and integrate with Sentry for real-time error reporting.

steps.title: Automated Debugging with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a delta analysis between your broken code and a functional baseline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file for common race conditions in async/await patterns and suggest a fix.

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Create a safety net by generating unit tests for your core business logic using your AI agent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Vitest unit tests for the auth controller, covering edge cases like token expiration and unauthorized access.

steps.title: Perform Root Cause Synthesis
steps.description: Reflect on the bug pattern to prevent future occurrences through better architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the debugging session into a 'lessons learned' markdown file, focusing on architectural improvements.

pro_tips: Treat your console errors as data points; always log the state of the app before the crash.
Use Zod for runtime type checking at the boundaries of your app to catch bugs before they hit the database.
Implement 'Feature Flags' to isolate new code, allowing you to toggle off buggy features without rolling back the entire deployment.
Master the art of 'Rubber Ducking' with Claude Code by asking it to explain the logic back to you in plain English.
Keep your repository 'clean' by running lint-staged hooks that prevent broken code from ever being committed.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is running, deploy it to Vercel and integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automate your testing and deployment phases.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are an AI-augmented engineer with the tools to build, break, and master complex systems. The path from 'debugging nightmare' to 'production-ready SaaS' starts with the right foundation. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
